mapper.sql: select ur.user_rights_id as userRightsId, ur.rights_template_id as rightsTemplateId, ur.owner_type as ownerType, ur.owner_id as ownerId, ur.source_type as sourceType, ur.source_ref_id as sourceRefId, ur.remain_quota as remainQuota, ur.valid_start as validStart, ur.valid_end as validEnd, case when ur.valid_end < #{now} and ur.status in ('available', 'approved', 'applying') then 'expired' when ur.status = 'revoked' then 'voided' else ur.status end as status, case when ur.valid_end < #{now} then 1 else 0 end as expired, ur.remark as remark, rt.rights_name as rightsName, rt.rights_type as rightsType, rt.quota_mode as quotaMode, rt.quota_value as quotaValue, rt.writeoff_mode as writeoffMode from jst_user_rights ur inner join jst_rights_template rt on ur.rights_template_id = rt.rights_template_id
mapper.select:
ur.del_flag = '0' and rt.del_flag = '0' and ur.owner_type = #{ownerType} and ur.owner_id = #{ownerId}
and ( case when ur.valid_end < #{now} and ur.status in ('available', 'approved', 'applying') then 'expired' when ur.status = 'revoked' then 'voided' else ur.status end ) in ('available', 'approved')
and ( case when ur.valid_end < #{now} and ur.status in ('available', 'approved', 'applying') then 'expired' when ur.status = 'revoked' then 'voided' else ur.status end ) = 'applying'
and ( case when ur.valid_end < #{now} and ur.status in ('available', 'approved', 'applying') then 'expired' when ur.status = 'revoked' then 'voided' else ur.status end ) = 'used'
and ( case when ur.valid_end < #{now} and ur.status in ('available', 'approved', 'applying') then 'expired' when ur.status = 'revoked' then 'voided' else ur.status end ) in ('expired', 'voided', 'rejected')
order by ur.valid_end asc, ur.user_rights_id desc

select record_id as recordId, writeoff_no as writeoffNo, use_amount as useAmount, apply_remark as applyRemark, status, audit_remark as auditRemark, writeoff_time as writeoffTime, create_time as createTime from jst_rights_writeoff_record where user_rights_id = #{userRightsId} and del_flag = '0' order by create_time desc, record_id desc
